title: Correct the handling of duplicate stage names
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

In a multistage build where multiple stages have the same nickname ("... AS stage0", for example), references to a stage using its nickname should resolve to the latest user of a name from the viewpoint of the stage that's referencing it.

#### How to verify it

New integration tests!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #6731

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Depends on https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/320.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
`buildah build` now resolves references to stages using the last stage with a given name, rather than the first, when multiple stages use the same name.
```
